history.content:
<thought>
I am at (1,1) facing right (east). The cell directly ahead (1,2) is lava, so I cannot move forward safely. I need to go down to reach the goal at (3,3). Turning right will orient me south, allowing me to move down along the left column (floor cells at (2,1) and (3,1)), then turn left to head east toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at position (1,1) facing down (v). Directly below me is a floor cell (2,1), which is safe. Moving forward will bring me closer to the goal (3,3) without encountering lava.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at (2,1) facing down, and the goal is at (3,3). Directly below me is an empty cell (3,1), which is safe. Moving forward will bring me closer to the goal without stepping on lava. If I turn right first, I would face lava at (2,2). So I should move forward now.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at (3,1) facing down (v). The goal is at (3,3) to my right. I need to face right (>) to move towards it. Currently facing down, turning left (counter-clockwise) will make me face right.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 3, column 1, facing right (`>`). The goal is at row 3, column 3, directly to the right. Moving forward will bring me closer to the goal, stepping onto a safe floor cell. I will then be one step away from the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am on the cell adjacent to the goal, facing right. The goal is directly in front of me. Moving forward will reach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
